challenges.name: Touch & Read
challenges.description: Detect and read any iButton using your Flipper Zero
instructions: Connect your Flipper Zero to the iButton probe
Navigate to 1-Wire > Read on your Flipper
Touch any iButton to the probe
The system will detect your read automatically
hints: Make sure the iButton makes good contact with the probe
Hold the iButton steady for 1-2 seconds

challenges.name: Clone iButton
challenges.description: Read an iButton and then emulate it with your Flipper Zero
instructions: Step 2: Save it on your Flipper Zero
Step 4: Touch the probe while emulating
hints: First read the original iButton to get its ID
Make sure emulation mode is active when touching the probe

challenges.name: Emulate Specific ID
challenges.description: Program your Flipper Zero to emulate a specific iButton ID
instructions: Program the target ID shown on screen into your Flipper
Emulate and touch the probe to verify
hints: Check byte order - Flipper may display LSB first
